Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.core
  2. ScanOptions

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.core.ScanOptions

Packages that use ScanOptions
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis
Connection package for Jedis library.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce
Connection package for Lettuce Redis client.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections
Package providing implementations for most of the java.util collections on top of Redis.

    ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyScanCommand.getOptions()
    Get the ScanOptions to apply.

    Method
    Description
    default Cursor<Map.Entry<byte[],byte[]>>
    DefaultedRedisConnection.hScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.hashCommands()}.

    default Flux<Map.Entry<ByteBuffer, ByteBuffer>>
    ReactiveHashCommands.hScan(ByteBuffer key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Flux to iterate over entries in the hash at key given ScanOptions.

    RedisHashCommands.hScan(byte @NonNull [] key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at key.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at key.

    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.keyCommands().

    DefaultStringRedisConnection.scan(ScanOptions options)

    ReactiveKeyCommands.scan(ScanOptions options)
    Use a Flux to iterate over keys.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over keys.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over keys.

    default Flux<ByteBuffer>
    ReactiveSetCommands.sScan(ByteBuffer key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Flux to iterate over members in the set at key given ScanOptions.
    Cursor<byte @NonNull []>
    RedisSetCommands.sScan(byte @NonNull [] key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in set at key.
    Cursor<String>
    StringRedisConnection.sScan(@NonNull String key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in set at key.
    ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyScanCommand
    ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyScanCommand.withOptions(ScanOptions options)
    Applies ScanOptions.
    default Cursor<Tuple>
    DefaultedRedisConnection.zScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.zSetCommands()}.

    DefaultStringRedisConnection.zScan(String key, ScanOptions options)
     
    default Flux<Tuple>
    ReactiveZSetCommands.zScan(ByteBuffer key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Flux to iterate over members in the sorted set at key given ScanOptions.
    Cursor<@NonNull Tuple>
    RedisZSetCommands.zScan(byte @NonNull [] key, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in sorted set at key.
    Cursor<StringRedisConnection.StringTuple>
    StringRedisConnection.zScan(@NonNull String key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in sorted set at key.

    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.

    ScanCursor.doScan(long cursorId, ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    since 3.3 cursorId, can exceed Long.MAX_VALUE.
    protected ScanIteration<T>
    ScanCursor.doScan(Cursor.CursorId cursorId, ScanOptions options)
    Performs the actual scan command using the native client implementation.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at the bound key.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in set at key.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in zset at the bound key.

    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at key.

    Constructors in org.springframework.data.redis.core with parameters of type ScanOptions
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    KeyBoundCursor(byte[] key, long cursorId, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    since 3.3 - Use KeyBoundCursor(byte[], CursorId, ScanOptions) instead.
     
    KeyBoundCursor(byte[] key, Cursor.CursorId cursorId, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Crates new ScanCursor
     
    ScanCursor(long cursorId, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    since 3.3 - Use ScanCursor(CursorId, ScanOptions) instead.
     
    ScanCursor(Cursor.CursorId cursorId, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Crates new ScanCursor
     
    ScanCursor(ScanOptions options)
    Crates new ScanCursor with an initial cursor.
